# TWN Feature Packets

Implementation must be driven by approved cross-volume feature packets, not by
a single blueprint volume in isolation.

Each feature folder should contain:

- README.md
- specification.md
- source-map.md
- current-state.md
- user-stories.md
- domain-rules.md
- permissions.md
- data-requirements.md
- ui-states.md
- api-contracts.md
- failure-cases.md
- security-and-privacy.md
- accessibility.md
- implementation-plan.md
- acceptance-criteria.md
- test-plan.md
- learning-guide.md
- content-opportunities.md
- unresolved-decisions.md
